name: Echinacea
summary: Echinacea entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: mixed.
description: Echinacea is cataloged as alkamide/caffeic acid botanical. Reported mechanisms: immune response modulation; cytokine/macrophage effects preclinical.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.9: Evidence is mixed and product-specific; keep standard priority, not top-tier.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Echinacea dosing is product-specific; extract species/preparation must match clinical product
